name: Hangcha Group Co., Ltd
summary: Hangcha Group Co., Ltd manufactures and sells forklift trucks in China. The company's material handling equipment include internal combustion (IC) forklift trucks, electric forklift trucks, warehouse equipment, tow tractors, side loading forklifts, explosion proof forklifts, empty container handlers, reach stacker, lifting platforms, and pallet truck forks for roll goods, as well as OEM components and parts, spare parts, and after-services internationally. It is also involved in the import and export activities. The company was founded in 1956 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, China.
